label: Extract Key
description: Pull a single value at a dot/bracket path from an object, with optional default. Replaces the transform-extract case for the common 'give me steps.X.data.id' pattern.

settings.name: input
settings.label: Input (template or upstream)
settings.description: Path-template to the source object. Omit to use the upstream connection's input directly.

settings.name: path
settings.label: Path
settings.description: Dot/bracket path to the value (e.g. 'response.data.id', 'items[0].name'). Returns found=false when the path is missing.

settings.name: default
settings.label: Default (when path missing)
settings.description: Optional fallback returned as `value` when the path doesn't resolve. `found` is still false to let downstream branches detect the miss.

ai.shortDescription: Extract a value at a dot/bracket path with optional default.
ai.whenToUse: When you need exactly one nested field from an upstream object (e.g. the id of the first item) and want a clean miss signal.
ai.examplePrompt: extract data.items[0].name from the http response, default to 'unknown'
ai.promptHints: Output: {{steps.X.value}} and {{steps.X.found}} (boolean). Branch on found via a condition node when the path is optional.

outputAssertions.name: shape_complete
outputAssertions.errorMessage: extract_key output is missing required keys (value, found).
